method: Gatsby static-query JSON (3 files); reference-keyed (collapses renames + CMS "(N)" dupes), then both BitGo MENA & CoinMENA forced in (distinct firms sharing VL/23/09/001); live-DOM cross-checked

agreedHeadlineCount.note: Khurram: '48 is fine'. 48 distinct active licence references; 49 active firms (BitGo MENA + CoinMENA share VL/23/09/001). ~20 IPA shown separately.

dataQuirks: VL/23/09/001 shared by TWO real firms (CoinMENA FZE & BitGo MENA FZE); both listed.
VL/24/06/001 listed once (current MEX Digital FZE; former MBIO FZE).
IPA tier from same source; verify per-entity before publishing.
WadzPay (WPME Technology LLC, VL/24/04/004) is Pending; VARA files it under the Licensed tab.
